reviews.challenge_summary: Low-risk architecture for a non-production demo. Two should_fix items: governance discovery and pricing validation. Both resolved in Step 4.

1 must_fix (dailyQuotaGb type mismatch), 5 should_fix (SWA naming, RG creation, FTPS attribution, rollback, AVM versions), 4 suggestions (budget alert, LAW tier label, SP auth default, tag casing). All resolved except budget alert (deferred to Step 5).

issues.title: dailyQuotaGb type mismatch — AVM expects int, plan specified decimal
FTPS and MI settings incorrectly attributed to managed Functions
issues.resolution: Corrected to list under Static Web App

issues.title: Resource group creation not in deployment workflow
issues.resolution: Added RG creation as pre-step in deploy.ps1

issues.title: AVM module versions not explicitly verified
issues.resolution: Verified via mcp_bicep_list_avm_metadata — no change needed

issues.title: SWA name collision risk — no unique suffix
issues.resolution: Added uniqueSuffix to SWA naming pattern

issues.title: Correct 'free tier' label for LAW
issues.resolution: Changed to '5 GB/day free ingestion allowance'

issues.title: Default deploy.ps1 to service principal auth
Explicitly state lowercase tag key convention
issues.resolution: Added tag casing note to Naming Conventions
